pendingApplications.proposal: Application for Certificate of Proposed Lawful Use for conversion of 2 flats to 1 no. dwellinghouse.

pendingApplications.address: Trafford MOT Centre 222 Kings Road Stretford Manchester M16 0GR
pendingApplications.proposal: Demolition of existing buildings and erection of an apartment block comprising 26 dwellings (Class C3), with communal amenity space, car parking and landscaping.

pendingApplications.address: Riverside Retail Park, Derwent Street, Salford, M5 4SW
pendingApplications.proposal: Article 18 consultation from Salford City Council in respect of PA/2026/0539 - Demolition of existing buildings and phased redevelopment to deliver 814 dwellings (Use Class C3) within three buildings of (Ground plus) 21, 25 and 34 storeys, alongside shared amenity space, basement car and cycle parking. Erection of a pavilion building for commercial and community uses (Use Classes E, F1, F2 and Sui Generis - drinking establishments), public realm and landscaping works including new access to the riverside walkway, servicing arrangements, and all associated works.
